summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Redline Studio YouTube automation dashboard. All core functionality working correctly including job creation, pipeline execution, template management, and settings configuration.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with KPI cards
Sidebar navigation works for all pages
Queue page job creation with all form fields
Queue page job filtering by status
Pipeline page shows all 6 steps correctly
Settings page YouTube OAuth credential inputs
Settings page anti-detection and COPPA switches
Settings page download workflow YAML button
Analytics page automation run history chart
